hero.headline: Personalized Technical Interview Prep with Your Resume
hero.subheadline: Just upload JD URL and your resume, and AI will generate personalized technical questions like a real interviewer

problem.title: Ever experienced this while preparing with chat AI?
points: Tedious process of writing long prompts every time
AI losing context as conversations get longer
Generic questions unrelated to your resume
One-way preparation with answers only, no feedback
Confusion from mixing multiple companies' interview prep

cards.title: No Complex Prompting
cards.description: Copy JD URL + Drag resume. Done.

cta.headline: Start now, and your next interview will be different
cta.subtext: Start for free, no credit card required

items.question: What features are included in the free trial?
items.answer: You can try all core features for free. Create 1 interview preparation and use AI question generation and feedback without limits.

items.question: Is my resume information safe?
items.answer: All data is encrypted and stored securely. Complete deletion is available anytime. We never share with third parties.

items.question: What resume formats do you support?
items.answer: We support PDF, DOCX, and TXT formats. Both Korean and English are supported.

items.question: What if I don't have a JD URL?
items.answer: You can directly copy and paste the text. URL is optional.

items.question: How accurate is the AI feedback?
items.answer: We use the latest LLM technology to provide interviewer-level feedback.

items.question: Can I prepare for multiple companies simultaneously?
items.answer: Yes, you can create separate interview preparations for each company and manage them simultaneously.

TECHNICAL_DECISION.name: Technical Decision Making
TECHNICAL_DECISION.questionHook: Why did you choose that technology?
TECHNICAL_DECISION.description: Defend your reasoning for selecting this technology over alternatives. Prove the validity of your architectural decisions.
TECHNICAL_DECISION.starRelevance: Validates if your choice (A) was appropriate for the given Situation (S) and Task (T).

TECHNICAL_DEPTH.name: Technical Depth & Principles
TECHNICAL_DEPTH.questionHook: How does this feature work internally?
TECHNICAL_DEPTH.description: Explain what actually happens behind the abstracted functionality of frameworks and libraries.
TECHNICAL_DEPTH.starRelevance: Validates technical depth and principles during Action (A) execution.

PROBLEM_SOLVING.name: Problem Solving & Verification
PROBLEM_SOLVING.questionHook: How did you solve the problem?
PROBLEM_SOLVING.description: Prove your relentless root cause analysis, resolution process, and impact with objective data.
PROBLEM_SOLVING.starRelevance: Validates logical causality between Action (A) and Result (R).

SCALABILITY.name: Scalability
SCALABILITY.questionHook: What if the system scales up?
SCALABILITY.description: Discuss potential bottlenecks when traffic or data increases 10x, 100x and propose improvements.
SCALABILITY.starRelevance: Validates insight for Future expansion beyond the immediate Result (R).

dialog.title: Generate Interview Questions
